query:
Your agent ID: 437-investigator

Bug report (GH Issue #437):

Title: bug: recurring_friction and dead_knowledge extractors write KM signals to ENTRIES instead of maintenance_recommendations

## Problem

Two extractors in unimatrix-observe produce ProposedEntry objects with created_by: "background-tick" that are written into the ENTRIES table as lesson-learned entries:

- crates/unimatrix-observe/src/extraction/recurring_friction.rs
- crates/unimatrix-observe/src/extraction/dead_knowledge.rs

These are knowledge management signals, not knowledge. They describe observations about the state of the knowledge base itself. Storing them as ENTRIES pollutes semantic search, consumes HNSW vector slots, and accumulates indefinitely as Active entries (confidence approx 0.29).

## Wrong output path

The maintenance_recommendations field in context_status already exists for surfacing exactly this kind of observation. Both signals belong there, not in ENTRIES.

## Fix needed

- Route recurring_friction findings to maintenance_recommendations (not ProposedEntry)
- Route dead_knowledge findings to maintenance_recommendations (not ProposedEntry)
- Remove the ENTRIES write path from both extractors
- Quarantine existing ENTRIES with created_by = "background-tick" in lesson-learned category (title prefix "Recurring friction:" or "Possible dead knowledge:")

## Related: #430 — same class of bug

Prior Unimatrix knowledge:
- Entry #3252: ExtractionRule must not perform side effects: maintenance actions belong in maintenance_tick, not in ProposedEntry output
- Entry #3254: ExtractionRule vs maintenance action: additive rules must not signal deprecation

Your tasks:
1. Read both extractor files fully
2. Trace the call chain: how does ProposedEntry output get written to ENTRIES? Who calls these extractors and processes their output?
3. Find where maintenance_recommendations is populated — trace from context_status handler back to the data source
4. Propose a minimal fix (specific file changes and functions)
5. Identify missing tests

Write your agent report to /workspaces/unimatrix/product/features/bugfix-437/agents/437-investigator-report.md
Post diagnosis as a comment on GH Issue #437

entries.title: ExtractionRule vs maintenance action: additive rules must not signal deprecation (GH #351)
dead_knowledge observation snippet must use \"id\": N or #N format — other formats silently ignored
Bug fix agents must write report files even when Unimatrix entries are confirmed in return values
Agent reports omit Knowledge Stewardship section unless structurally enforced — recurring pattern (col-022, col-028, nan-009, crt-030)
Renaming a detection rule requires updating 5+ string-keyed match arms across two crates plus all agent-facing SKILL.md files
